description: Generic Whistle configuration primitives with no country, state, or city assumptions.
license: MIT for original Whistle configuration text; adopter must verify any imported external data licenses.

metadata.notes: Use this as the base for one-state, one-country, city, or office-level jurisdiction packs.

jurisdictionKinds.label: Deployment Root
jurisdictionKinds.description: Top-level configured jurisdiction for one Whistle deployment.

jurisdictionKinds.label: Administrative Area
jurisdictionKinds.description: A general government geography such as state, district, province, city, county, or region.

jurisdictionKinds.label: Representative Area
jurisdictionKinds.description: An elected representative's constituency, ward, division, district, or similar area.

jurisdictionKinds.label: Local Area
jurisdictionKinds.description: A ward, panchayat, municipality, village, borough, zone, or local service area.

jurisdictionKinds.label: Portfolio
jurisdictionKinds.description: A ministry, department, agency, board, or service-delivery portfolio.

jurisdictionKinds.label: Protected Queue
jurisdictionKinds.description: A restricted non-geographic scope for corruption, vigilance, whistleblower, or sensitive complaints.

jurisdictionKinds.label: System Scope
jurisdictionKinds.description: A non-public scope for Admin, jobs, integrations, and platform operations.
